CreateOauth2Client.name: Client name (1-64 characters, unique within the pool)
CreateOauth2Client.clientType: Client type: WEB_APP / SPA / M2M, default WEB_APP
CreateOauth2Client.redirectUris: Allowed redirect URI whitelist (at least 1, up to 20)
CreateOauth2Client.accessTokenTtl: Access token TTL in seconds, default 3600
CreateOauth2Client.refreshTokenTtl: Refresh token TTL in seconds, default 604800
